messages.content: hey, kind of a brutal week honestly. just wanna decompress for a sec

Hey, glad you reached out. Brutal weeks deserve a proper decompression moment.

It's late too - you've made it through the whole thing. What's been the worst of it, if you want to get into it? Or if you'd rather just chat about something totally unrelated and give your brain a break, that works too. Whatever sounds better right now.
work's been slammed, three deadlines stacked on top of each other and my manager keeps adding stuff

Ugh, that's such a specific kind of exhausting - like you're trying to drain a bathtub while someone keeps turning the faucet back on. You can't even get the satisfaction of finishing something before the next thing lands.

Did you at least get through the deadlines, or are some of them still hanging over you?
i'm just wiped. like physically tired, gonna crash early tonight and hopefully feel human tomorrow

That sounds like exactly the right call honestly. Sometimes the most productive thing you can do is just shut it all down and sleep.

Hope tomorrow feels a bit lighter. Weekends are good for that - even just a slow morning can do a lot after a week like that.
ngl part of me wishes i could just disappear for a weekend with no phone lol. a cabin or something

Oh that sounds genuinely amazing. Like completely off the grid, no notifications, no manager adding things to your list at 6pm - just trees and quiet and nobody needing anything from you.

Do you actually do that kind of thing ever, or is it more of a fantasy at this point? 😄
anyway thanks for letting me vent. nothing's wrong really, just needed to dump it somewhere

Hey, that's what venting is for - sometimes you just need somewhere to put it so it's not rattling around in your head all night.

Go get some sleep. Hope the week ahead is kinder to you 😊
